name: Whimpering Wastes
description: Assemble unique lineups and equip distinct Tokens to conquer challenging levels.

name: [Bountiful Crescendo] Limited-Time Material Double Drop Event
description: Spend Waveplates to claim double rewards after completing a Simulation or Forgery Challenge.

name: Aced! Combat Mastery Test!
description: The event features 7 sets of tests. Each set consists of a Preliminary Test with Associate Assessors and a Final Test with a Chief Assessor. Meet the various requirements to buff up the team in the Preliminary Test. All buffs obtained in the Preliminary Test are carried over in the Final Test.

name: Crossworld Sync: Pt. 1
description: "Resident Evil 30th Anniversary," "Angry Birds," and "Kaiju No. 8" Collab Event. Complete tasks in the Collab Event to obtain the corresponding Collab Livery and various levelling Materials.

name: Cubie Derby: Championship
description: During the event, Cubes will take part in matches in various groups. The entire competition is comprised of 3 Stages: Preliminary, Eliminator, and the Final. You can support your favorite Cube by predicting the Match Winner of the day. After the round, Popularity rewards are granted based on the Cubes' final placements and the prediction outcomes.

name: Endstate Matrix High Difficulty Recurring Challenge
description: In Endstate Matrix, deploy Resonators and select a Power Circuit before starting a high-difficulty challenge. Endstate Matrix progresses through Challenge Cycles. Each Challenge Cycle spans across multiple Challenge Phases, which reset with version updates. Rewards are offered independently for Challenge Cycles and Challenge Phases.

name: Tactical Hologram: Synchronization
description: [Tactical Hologram: Synchronization] is a prime testing ground for combat prowess, where powerful foes abound. Get ready to challenge Tactical Hologram: Hyvatia in Version 3.2's Tactical Hologram!

name: Back to Solaris
description: Share your invitation code with up to 3 Returning Players in your server, complete in-game tasks to obtain Startorch Sigils. Returning Players can link their accounts with the Player of their choice by using their corresponding invitation code. This can be done once. After linking, Returning Players are eligible to claim rewards.

name: Beyond the Waves: Roya Frostlands
description: During the event, you can complete event tasks once per day to obtain a set number of Adventure Logs. Each Adventure Log can be exchanged for an Adventure Package.

name: Crossworld Sync: Pt. 2
description: "PRAGMATA," "Riders Republic," and "HAIKYU !! "(anime) Collab Event. Complete tasks in the Collab Event to obtain the corresponding Collab Livery and various levelling Materials.

name: Depths of Illusive Realm: Chromatic Fantasy
description: The challenge features three "Surface of Illusions" stages and one "Depth of Illusions" stage. Before entering, you can adjust the reward rate via Memetic Tuning. Higher rates yield greater rewards. Clearing stages earns you Illusive Specimen and Memory Points. Illusive Specimens can be used to exchange for Astrites and other rewards. Spend Memory Points in Thought Revolution to upgrade your abilities, making future challenges easier.

name: Dimmer Traces
description: The event consists of 4 phases, unlocked in sequence as you progress through the Main Quest. In each phase, you complete event tasks, including puzzle solving, combat, item collecting, to unlock and obtain rewards based on the number of Voidmatter Chips obtained.

name: Gifts of Starlight
description: During the event, log in to claim the day's login rewards from the event page.

name: Pioneer Podcast
description: During Pioneer Podcast, you can obtain Podcast EXP by completing Podcast Tasks to increase the Podcast Level and win various rewards.

name: [Chord Cleansing] Limited-Time Echo Double Drop Event
description: Spend Waveplates to claim double rewards after completing a Tacet Suppression challenge.

name: Gifts of Grand Celebration
description: Log in during the event period to claim the rewards.

name: Lollo Express: Promise Delivered
description: During the event, complete event tasks to earn delivery rewards.

name: Second Coming of Solaris: Collab Season
description: During the event, visit the event page to take part in various anniversary activities. Earn 2nd Anniversary

name: Star Bouncing
description: Access the game in the Mind Dive Arcade or the event page and start your adventure in the infinite galaxy of Star Bouncing. Along the way, you can collect various Persona Pinballs and use them to build different lineups to take on your foes.

name: Bountiful Waves
description: Complete Spindrift Tasks to earn Spindrifts, which can be ex- changed for various items in the Bountiful Waves.
